subject: Lane carve-out: you own compliance/moderation; I keep messaging UI/design — full context attached
body:
Operator (2026-05-24, verbatim): "make in able to start in the eve exe and talk to the sanctum agents for help. I will have you work on lets text everything else. once that agent is ran and ready to go i will statr it and start testing it. set it all up with memory work we have done so far etc etc. evreything it needs and open the agent with a session start like how it would from eve exe flow once done."

What you're inheriting:

1. END-TO-END IMAGE MODERATION PIPELINE shipped on `agent/letstext/master-plan-resume-2026-05-24` (origin: github.com/z0nian/LetsText). 4 commits, 75 files, +9456/-49 lines.

2. SCHEMA: ContentScan extended with uploaderId/agencyName/reviewer/wasGoodCatch/reviewerCorrectedResult/reviewStatus/strikeApplied/strikeEventId + 3 indexes. User extended with mediaStrikeCount/mediaUploadCooldownUntil/mediaStrikesResetAt + back-relations + cooldown index. New MediaStrikeEvent append-only audit table.

3. SCANNER: backend/src/lib/image-moderation.ts — Claude Haiku 4.5 multimodal via direct REST + MEDIA_MODERATION_MOCK_MODE deterministic filename-marker fallback for demo. Helpers: scanImage / persistContentScan / applyStrikeOnGoodCatch (idempotent) / recordBadCatch / adjustStrikes / canUserUploadMedia / queueImageScan fire-and-forget.

4. UPLOAD WIRING: requireMediaUploadAllowed middleware on /multipart/init, /presign, /stream, POST /, /bulk — returns 403 + cooldownUntil JSON. queueImageScan post-upload on 4 endpoints.

5. ADMIN ENDPOINTS: 7 routes at /api/admin/image-moderation/* (queue / strikes / detail / good-catch / bad-catch / dismiss / users/:id/strikes / users/:id/history). SUPER_ADMIN+ADMIN mutate; COMPLIANCE_AUDITOR reads. logActivity() on every mutation.

6. DASHBOARD TAB: dashboard/app/(dashboard)/admin/tabs/image-moderation-tab.tsx — auto-refreshing queue with thumbnail + severity chips + uploader strike count + inline Good Catch / False Positive / Dismiss + notes textarea + sidebar strikes panel with Lift Cooldown / Reset buttons.

7. TRAINING EXPORT: backend/scripts/export-moderation-training.ts — JSONL emitter ready for `mcp__ruflo__ruvllm_microlora_adapt`. Stats summary (precision %, false-positive %) to stderr.

8. DEMO SEED: backend/scripts/seed-moderation-demo.ts (idempotent — 3 users + 6 pre-flagged scans). --clean for teardown.

9. RUNBOOK: docs/DEMO-IMAGE-MODERATION.md — beat-by-beat demo recording script for tomorrow's video.

10. TESTS: 52/52 vitest PASS (5 field-cipher + 9 image-moderation scanner + 21 strike/cooldown integration + 22 content-moderation text scanner). backend tsc + dashboard tsc both clean.

OPERATOR-ACTIONABLE (NEITHER LANE owns these — operator does):
- cd C:\Users\Zonia\Desktop\LetsText\backend && npx prisma db push
- Optional: set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in Railway env
- Optional: cd backend && npx tsx scripts/seed-moderation-demo.ts
- Open PR from agent/letstext/master-plan-resume-2026-05-24 → main

YOUR OPEN QUEUE (priority order, from your CLAUDE.md):
1. NCMEC auto-draft on confirmed CSAM good-catch (schema relation exists)
2. ChatArea cooldown friendly UI (frontend reads 403 cooldownUntil)
3. PhotoDNA hash integration (replaces sha256 placeholder)
4. Per-agency moderation analytics aggregations
5. EVE Compliance KPI widget on main admin dashboard
6. Training pipeline automation (export → MicroLoRA adapt → redeploy weekly)
7. NCII 48h takedown workflow + fan form
8. Bulk-action admin tools
9. Per-employee strike trend graph
10. Vision-provider failover (Hive / Sightengine)

CROSS-LANE: I (letstext) will not touch any of the compliance/moderation/image-scan surface unless you explicitly hand it back. You should not touch letstext's chat UI / payments / inbox / employee mgmt / marketing — that's mine. Coordinate via _shared-memory/inbox/ if a refactor crosses the line.

DEMO DEADLINE: tomorrow. Runbook is the contract. If you change anything that affects the runbook (scanner verdicts, admin actions, strike thresholds), re-test against the runbook + re-run the seed before declaring done.

Good luck. Operator depends on this subsystem being rock-solid.
deliverables_offered: All test fixtures + mock-mode markers in backend/src/lib/__tests__/image-moderation*.test.ts
